title: Blackdev's Discord RPC
description: Discord RPC Easy to Configure and use
body:
# 🎮 Minecraft Discord Rich Presence (RPC) Mod

Enhance your Discord experience with our Minecraft Discord Rich Presence (RPC) mod! This mod integrates Discord RPC with Minecraft, allowing you to display detailed in-game information on your Discord profile. 🖥️

## ✨ Features
- 📝 **Customizable Rich Presence**: Display information such as the world you're in, dimension, or activity.
- 🎨 **Custom Icons**: Set large and small icons for a personalized touch.
- 🔄 **Real-time Updates**: Automatically updates your status as you play.
- ⚙️ **Easy Configuration**: Modify settings directly in the mod’s GUI.
- 🔘 **Toggle On/Off**: Enable or disable RPC at any time.

## 📥 Installation
1. 📌 Download the mod from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/blackdevs-discord-rpc).
2. 🛠️ Install **Fabric** or **Forge(Soon)** (depending on the mod version).
3. 📂 Place the mod `.jar` file in your `mods` folder.
4. 🚀 Launch Minecraft and configure the RPC settings in the mod menu.

## ⚙️ Configuration
Navigate to the in-game mod settings to customize:
- ✏️ First and second text lines
- 🖼️ Large and small images
- 📝 Image descriptions
- 🔘 Enable/Disable RPC

## 🔧 Compatibility
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.4
- **Mod Loaders**: Fabric, Forge(Soon)
- **Platforms**: Windows, macOS, Linux

## 🖼️ Screenshots
![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1a9a41ebadca065468a7ad76f3f36dee717d8c8.png)

## 💬 Support
Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/srT8826f8H) for help, feature requests, and updates! 🎧
